title: Factors Influencing Project Success and Failure
description: A flowchart illustrating the interconnected factors that lead to software project success or failure, showing how requirements, planning, execution, and monitoring contribute to outcomes.
relationships: Clear Requirements and Realistic Planning lead to Effective Execution
Effective Execution combined with Stakeholder Engagement and Adequate Resources leads to Project Success
Scope Creep and Poor Communication lead to Inadequate Testing
Inadequate Testing combined with Unrealistic Deadlines and Budget Overruns leads to Project Failure
